name: Cult Fanatic
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name":"Dark Devotion","desc":"The fanatic has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened."},{"name":"Spellcasting","desc":"The fanatic is a 4th-level spellcaster. Its spell casting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 11, +3 to hit with spell attacks). The fanatic has the following cleric spells prepared: Cantrips (at will): light, sacred flame, thaumaturgy; 1st level (4 slots): command, inflict wounds, shield of faith; 2nd level (3 slots): hold person, spiritual weapon"}]

### Actions
[{"name":"Multiattack","desc":"The fanatic makes two melee attacks."},{"name":"Dagger","desc":"Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage."}]
